query:
SELECT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM samples s
                WHERE s.id = $1 AND s.creador_id = $2
                UNION
                SELECT 1 FROM samples s
                JOIN descargas d ON d.sample_id = s.id AND d.usuario_id = $2
                WHERE s.id = $1 AND s.estado = 'activo'
            ) AS "existe!: bool"
